summary: Completed comprehensive testing of batch entry and dispatch features. All 5 user-reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) Finished products from batch now appear correctly (Dahi-400gm pouch with stock=50), 2) Entries can be modified (edit buttons work), 3) All dispatches visible with edit/delete buttons, 4) Batch entry has date filter, 5) Qty produced visible in batch list. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Login with admin/admin123
Batch Entry page: Shows quantity produced column with values
Batch Entry page: Filter button opens date range filter
Batch Entry page: Apply filter works (filters by date)
Batch Entry page: Reset filter works
Batch Entry page: Edit button opens form with batch data pre-filled
Batch Entry page: Delete button visible for admin users
GET /api/batches returns all batches with quantity_produced field
GET /api/batches?start_date=2026-03-23&end_date=2026-03-23 returns filtered batches
GET /api/batches/{id} returns single batch
Finished Products page: Dahi-400gm pouch appears in stock ledger with stock=50
Finished Products page: All Dispatches table shows 4 dispatches
Finished Products page: Edit dispatch buttons visible
Finished Products page: Delete dispatch buttons visible for admin
Finished Products page: Edit dispatch opens form pre-filled with dispatch data
Finished Products page: Create Dispatch form has dispatch date field
PUT /api/dispatch/{id} updates dispatch successfully
DELETE /api/dispatch/{id} endpoint works (404 for non-existent)
DELETE /api/batches/{id} endpoint works (404 for non-existent)
Semi-Finished Products page: Still works with expandable ledger
Raw Material Stock page: Still works with expandable ledger
Navigation between all pages works
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 user-reported issues have been fixed: 1) BatchResponse now includes quantity_produced field (default 0 for old records), 2) Batch creation with output_type='finished' creates finished_products record automatically, 3) Dahi-400gm pouch backfilled with stock=50, 4) Batch delete endpoint added (admin only), 5) Dispatch update/delete endpoints added with stock restoration, 6) Batch list supports date range filtering, 7) Dispatch form has date field. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_batch_dispatch_features.py
